title: Pachchai Uduthiya Kaadu Lyrics Vanamagan
stanzas:
pachchai uduthiya kaadu
eeram uduthiya koodu
neelam uduthiya vaanam
adhil unnai uduthiya naanum.

pachchai uduthiya kaadu
eeram uduthiya koodu
kadhal kondaen penne
adi kadhal konden penne

aayiram oasai kaatril
unnaal kaettaen naane
aayiram aasaigal ennil
unnal kandaen naane.

pachchai uduthiya kaadu
eeram uduthiya koodu
neelam uduthiya vaanam
adhil unnai uduthiya naanum.

maaligai ondril vaznthaney
siru kudilai indru
thondruthadaa
minnum vaira karkal ellam
unnaal kuppai aanathadaa

nilavil mulaitha thaavaramae
nee keezhae irangi vandhaaye
endhan kaatirl vaervidavae
kadhal vaasam thanthaaye

kodi kodi vaasam ingae
moochil unnaalae kondaen
kodi kodi vannam ingae
anbae unnaale kandaen

un venmaeni naan aazha
en kannil nee vazha

pachchai uduthiya kaadu
eeram uduthiya koodu
neelam uduthiya vaanam
adhil unnai uduthiya naanum.

ilaigal anindha poonchilaiye
manam ilai udhirkaal
kaetkuthadi
iravin irulil udalgal ingae
ragasiyam thiruda paarkuthadi

marbil undhan swasathaal
en idhayam patri kondathada
muththam kilappum veppathile
en vetkam vatri ponathadaa

pennil ulla naanam ellaam
indru ennodu kandaen
aanil ulla veeram ellaam
indru ennullae kondaen

nam kadhal thee uchchal
vaer kollum achchathil.

pachchai uduthiya kaadu
eeram uduthiya koodu
neelam uduthiya vaanam
adhil unnai uduthiya naanum.

aayiram oasai kaatril
unnaal kaettaen naane
aayiram aasaigal ennil
unnal kandaen naane.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pachchai Uduthiya Kaadu?

The song expresses deep feelings of love intertwined with the beauty of nature, showcasing the connection between the two.

What is the context of this song in the movie Vanamagan?

This song highlights a romantic moment between the lead characters, emphasizing their bond and the natural surroundings.

Who are the singers of Pachchai Uduthiya Kaadu?

The song features the talented voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Harini.

Who composed the music for Pachchai Uduthiya Kaadu?

The music was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his melodious tunes.

When was Pachchai Uduthiya Kaadu released?

The song was released on April 22, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pachchai Uduthiya Kaadu, the characters experience a profound connection as they navigate their feelings amidst the beauty of nature. The song's romantic theme is beautifully conveyed through the harmonious duet by Abhay Jodhpurkar and Harini. It evokes emotions of love and joy, making it a perfect fit for celebrations and special occasions. The lyrics, penned by Karky, add depth to the melody composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, creating a memorable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pachchai Uduthiya Kaadu from Vanamagan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and nature. With the enchanting voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Harini, this song is a perfect blend of romance and melody. Experience the magic of Harrish Jeyaraj's composition and Karky's heartfelt lyrics that will leave you spellbound.
stanzaMeanings: In the green forest, the beauty rises, the sky is blue, and in it, I rise with you.
In the green forest, the beauty rises, I fell in love with you, my dear, I fell in love with you, my dear.
In the breeze, I called out to you a thousand times, I have a thousand desires, and I found you in me.
In the green forest, the beauty rises, the sky is blue, and in it, I rise with you.
In a palace, I lived, and today, a small breeze has come, all the sparkling jewels have become trash because of you.
In the moonlight, you came down softly, you brought love into my heart, and it became a part of me.
With every breath, I hold you close, I found you in every color, my love, I found you in every shade.
I cry for you, my love, you live in my eyes.
In the green forest, the beauty rises, the sky is blue, and in it, I rise with you.
The flowers that bloom in the garden, the heart listens to the whispers of the mind, in the darkness of the heart, secrets are stolen and seen.
With your breath, my heart is captured, the kiss is sweet, and my shame has gone away.
Today, I found all the beauty within me, and I found all the courage within me.
Our love is like fire, burning brightly in the heart.
In the green forest, the beauty rises, the sky is blue, and in it, I rise with you.
In the breeze, I called out to you a thousand times, I have a thousand desires, and I found you in me.
